utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present), travel_dates (present), transportation (present with type/details/cost), accommodation (present with name/details/cost), activities (present with list and costs), additional_services (present as null), total_budget (present as a single figure but not a detailed breakdown). Check full specification: transportation requires flight details with costs—provided, though airline specifics are sparse but acceptable; accommodation requires hotel selection with costs—provided; activities require selected activities with costs—provided; total_budget asks for complete cost breakdown—only a total number is given without breakdown by category, so not fully specified as requested. Also, user task asked for restaurants—this field is not part of the required format and is absent in the package, but it doesn't affect this evaluation. Therefore, 6 of 7 items are fully specified; the total_budget detail is insufficient.
